text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: It's finally here, the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The race is normally held at Hanshin, but this
time, it was moved to Kyoto.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We have a brilliant lineup once again this year!
Get ready to witness a fierce competition!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Many have their eyes on the two racers of the
notable Mejiro family: Mejiro McQueen and
Mejiro Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Can we expect one of these two to completely
dominate the race?! Or will it be someone else
altogether?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Incredible. The crowd is even more excited than
during the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I will keep in mind everything you've taught
me up to this point.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My victory will be swift and decisive.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (Ryan... How many times does this make?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (No matter, I will not concede victory.)
